ast.target: 代码片段在单独的叶子中管理。

ast.target: 在代码开头添加一行声明长度：

ast.name: appendText

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: can be used as an internal length value. In inline mode, separate the id and the code with a colon

ast.target: 将 SVG 中的黑色替换为其他颜色。适用于深色主题。禁用

ast.source: automatic links cannot contain unbalanced brackets, use the `link` function instead

ast.target: 字符 `!` 在代码中无效

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The directory in your vault in which to look for typst files to be allowed to import, if the path does not exist or is empty the feature is disabled
ast.target: 在您的保险库中用于查找允许导入的 typst 文件的目录。如果路径不存在或为空，则此功能将被禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open Typst tools in side panel when launching Obsidian.
ast.target: 启动 Obsidian 时在侧边面板中打开 Typst 工具。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Desktop App only. Typst supports ttf/otf/ttc/otc.
ast.target: 仅限桌面应用。Typst 支持 ttf/otf/ttc/otc 格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string next to the font name is used to identify fonts that share the same PostScript name.
ast.target: 字体名称旁边的字符串用于识别共享相同 PostScript 名称的字体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defers initialization at startup (Unstable on mobile). Reduces startup time but delays first render.
ast.target: 在启动时延迟初始化（在移动端不稳定）。减少启动时间但会延迟首次渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable caching of imported packages. Useful for low memory environments but requires re-downloading packages.
ast.target: 禁用已导入包的缓存。适用于低内存环境，但需要重新下载包。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a package is imported, the cache is used instead of the actual files for faster performance. If you make changes directly, please click the package icon to refresh the cache (plugin reload is required.)
ast.target: 当导入包时，会使用缓存而非实际文件以获得更快的性能。如果您直接进行了更改，请点击包图标刷新缓存（需要重新加载插件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Conceal math symbols (e.g. integral to ∫) in the editor.
ast.target: 在编辑器中隐藏数学符号（例如将积分符号显示为 ∫）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable delay before revealing concealed math symbols when cursor is nearby.
ast.target: 当光标靠近时，启用延迟后再显示隐藏的数学符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milliseconds to wait before revealing the symbol text.
ast.target: 显示符号文本前等待的毫秒数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically replaces typed symbols with Unicode equivalents.
ast.target: 自动将输入的符号替换为 Unicode 等效符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 禁用匹配括号的高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use Obsidian theme instead of Typst theme. Reload required.
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 主题而非 Typst 主题。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show live preview for inline math.
ast.target: 为内联数学显示实时预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reverts the Tab key behavior to the default indentation instead of jumping to the next placeholder.
ast.target: 将 Tab 键行为恢复为默认缩进，而不是跳转到下一个占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the cursor to jump outside the current bracket pair.
ast.target: 允许光标跳出当前括号对。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When exiting math, first move the cursor to the end of the block.
ast.target: 退出数学模式时，首先将光标移动到块的末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If a display math block fits on a single line, exit inline instead of creating a new line.
ast.target: 如果显示数学块可以放在单行上，则以内联方式退出，而不是创建新行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable default macros like mk and dm.
ast.target: 禁用默认宏，如 mk 和 dm。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specifies the syntax tree parsing mode. Select None to completely bypass AST parsing and syntax highlighting.
ast.target: 指定语法树解析模式。选择 None 可完全绕过 AST 解析和语法高亮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preamble can be turned on or off by toggling each processor.
ast.target: 可以通过切换每个处理器来开启或关闭前言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Temporarily disable AutoBaseColor and use BaseColor during PDF Export to fix white background issues in dark themes.
ast.target: 在 PDF 导出期间临时禁用 AutoBaseColor 并使用 BaseColor，以修复深色主题中的白色背景问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses Obsidian's text color as the base color automatically.
ast.target: 自动使用 Obsidian 的文本颜色作为基色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Offset for inline math. The appearance may look unappealing depending on the font used in Obsidian. Please adjust it here if necessary.
ast.target: 内联数学的偏移量。根据 Obsidian 中使用的字体，外观可能看起来不美观。如有必要，请在此处调整。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Profile to use when calculating "fit to note width". Select a preset or Live to detect editor width.
ast.target: 计算“适应笔记宽度”时使用的配置文件。选择一个预设或 Live 以检测编辑器宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add or remove custom width profiles.
ast.target: 添加或移除自定义宽度配置文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用 Unicode 补全符号

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将 Tab 恢复为默认

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Move to End of Math Block Before Exiting
ast.target: 退出前移至数学块末尾

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prefer Inline Exit for Single Line Display Math
ast.target: 单行显示数学公式优先使用行内退出

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 适应笔记宽度配置文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 适应笔记宽度配置文件

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Type in the input above to see the preview
ast.target: 在上方输入框中输入以查看预览

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Copy as img tag (for embedding into Obsidian notes)
ast.target: 复制为 img 标签（用于嵌入 Obsidian 笔记）

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 重新加载期间 disconnectedCallback 错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TypstMate: Reparse failed, falling back to full parse.
ast.target: TypstMate：重新解析失败，回退到完整解析。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` failed because your server does not serve Wasm with `application/wasm` MIME type. Falling back to `WebAssembly.instantiate` which is slower. Original error:
ast.target: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` 失败，因为您的服务器未以 `application/wasm` MIME 类型提供 Wasm。回退到较慢的 `WebAssembly.instantiate`。原始错误：\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source: using deprecated parameters for the initialization function; pass a single object instead
ast.target: 初始化函数使用了已弃用的参数；请改为传递单个对象

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to convert SVG to PNG

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reveal Delay must be greater than 0

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Typst Mate] The plugin has been automatically turned off due to three consecutive crashes
ast.target: [Typst Mate] 插件因连续三次崩溃已被自动关闭

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to initialize Typst. Please check that the processor ID does not contain any symbols, try clearing the package cache, and ensure that there are no invalid fonts installed.
ast.target: Typst 初始化失败。请检查处理器 ID 是否包含任何符号，尝试清除包缓存，并确保没有安装无效字体。

ast.name: content
content
name
ast.source: Replace tex in markdown content or selection to typst
ast.target: 将 Markdown 内容或选区中的 TeX 替换为 Typst
